hero.title: Your perfect smile is our mission.
hero.subtitle: We provide fast, painless, and long-lasting dental services using the latest technology. Regain your confidence with our expert team.

fast.title: Fast and Painless
fast.desc: We use the latest methods and anesthetics so every treatment is completely comfortable and efficient.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.desc: World-class materials and years of experience guarantee long-lasting results.

esthetic.title: Aesthetics First
esthetic.desc: We focus on the natural look of your teeth, bringing back your radiant smile.

services.title: Comprehensive Dental Services
services.desc: From preventive check-ups to complex prosthetic work, our team is here for your dental health.

items.title: Aesthetic Dentistry
items.desc: Teeth whitening, veneers, and composite restorations for a perfect smile.

items.title: Prosthetics
items.desc: High-quality crowns, bridges, and dentures with a natural look.

items.title: Conservative
items.desc: Caries treatment, endodontics, and tooth repairs using modern materials.

items.title: Preventive
items.desc: Regular check-ups, tartar removal, and polishing for long-term health.

doctor.title: Dr. Sanela Kapić
doctor.quote: "My mission is to break the fear of dentists and give you the smile you deserve, with a gentle approach and the latest global technology."

gallery.title: Proof of Our Quality
gallery.desc: Transformations that restore confidence. Your smile is our best advertisement.

reviews.name: Amira S.
reviews.text: Best dental experience ever! Dr. Sanela is extremely attentive and professional. The clinic is beautiful and modern.

reviews.name: Kenan M.
reviews.text: I had a fear of dentists for years, but I felt completely relaxed here. Full recommendations for this wonderful team!

reviews.name: Lejla H.
reviews.text: I got veneers and the result is beyond all my expectations. I finally smile with confidence. Thank you doctor!

faq.title: Have questions? We have answers.
faq.missing: Didn't find the answer you're looking for?

items.question: Do dental exams hurt?
items.answer: No! We use modern anesthetics and methods to make every treatment completely painless and comfortable for the patient.

items.question: How often should I come for a check-up?
items.answer: We recommend regular check-ups every 6 months to prevent major problems and maintain dental hygiene.

items.question: How long does teeth whitening take?
items.answer: In-office laser whitening usually takes about 45 minutes to an hour, with instantly visible results.

items.question: Do you offer payment in installments?
items.answer: Yes, for larger prosthetic work we offer installment payments. You'll get a detailed plan and price at your free consultation.

footer.desc: Premium dental service in the heart of Sarajevo. Your smile is our care.
footer.rights: Dental clinic Dr. Sanela Kapić. All rights reserved.

gallery_page.title: Proof of our Quality
gallery_page.desc: See the results of our work. Your smile is our best advertisement.

process_page.title: Path to your new smile
process_page.desc: We know a dentist visit can be stressful. That is why we created a transparent 4-step process prioritizing your comfort and safety.

cta.title: Ready for the first step?
cta.desc: Do not delay caring for your health. Contact us today and book your free consultation.

steps.title: First contact and consultation
steps.desc: It all starts with your call or message. We schedule a convenient time. At the first visit, we carefully listen to your wishes and problems, without any obligation.

steps.title: Detailed diagnostics and plan
steps.desc: We use modern technology for precise diagnostics. Then, we create a clear therapy plan with offered options and fully transparent prices.

steps.title: Painless treatment
steps.desc: We perform the procedure in a relaxing atmosphere, using modern anesthetics. We follow your pace and take breaks whenever you need.

steps.title: Recovery and new smile
steps.desc: We give you detailed maintenance instructions and are always available for questions post-procedure. Your healthy smile is our ultimate goal.

about_page.name: Dr. Sanela Kapić
about_page.desc1: Welcome to my clinic. With over 15 years of experience in dentistry, my mission is to break the fear of dentists and provide you with the smile you deserve.
about_page.desc2: I approach every patient with special care, deeply aware that dental procedures can cause discomfort. Therefore, my priority is to create a relaxing atmosphere where you will feel safe and comfortable. I strive to make each visit a pleasant experience.
about_page.edu_desc: I graduated from the Faculty of Dentistry in Skopje, where I gained a solid foundation. Since then, I continuously invest in education and tracking the latest global trends in dentistry.
about_page.exp_desc: I regularly participate in domestic and international congresses in aesthetic dentistry and prosthodontics to provide my patients exclusively with premium and modern services.
about_page.phil_desc: My approach is gentle, precise, and entirely focused on you. I believe mutual trust is key, which is why I approach every problem highly individually and compassionately.

contact_page.title: Book your appointment
contact_page.desc: Ready for a perfect smile? Contact us today and book free consultations. Our team in Sarajevo is expecting you.

services_page.title: Service Pricing
services_page.desc: We believe in complete transparency. Below is a general pricing list for common services. The exact price depends on the individual treatment plan defined at the free consultation.
services_page.cta_desc: Every smile is unique. Book a free consultation and get a fully personalized treatment plan with precise costs.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Sanela! Her warmth, patience, and special approach to children made my child completely lose his fear of dentists.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Arnisa Z.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: I was stunned by the professionalism and the approach of the personnel. I didnt have the usual unpleasantness I expect when visiting a dentist.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Gocuman A.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: All praises for the work and approach to the patient; besides removing problems, she removes the patients fear. Best regards to the team!
testimonials_page_reviews.name: M. R.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: Top service and professionalism, extremely satisfied with the approach and relationship, perfect ten!
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Neo S.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: Dr. Kapić has an excellent approach to patients. You can feel her humanity, care and desire to find the best solution. She doesnt mask the problem but solves it.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Ilma I.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: Professional, wonderful and kind doctor! Recommended from the bottom of my heart!
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Hurijeta N.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: After 10 dentists I visited with my child, we finally found the right one. The atmosphere is more than excellent, and the doctor is a wonderful human first.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Arnela H.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: Too kind and very professional! Warm recommendations.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Senka A.

testimonials_page_reviews.text: Wonderful staff, special and professional doctor, and most importantly she has a big heart, highly recommended.
testimonials_page_reviews.name: Azra K.
